root.text:
Mark well the words of the ancient tree;
I see what was and, too, what might be.
I helped Aadepts many moons ago.
If you’re wise, you shall heed what I know.
I spoke once of Great Battles you’d face.
root.hint: Reasonable owners between Districts 11 & 12 are complaining of a large unidentified structure growing out of the ground.

root.text:
Hungry eyes lusting for your city.
Countless long legs shall break down your door,
While drooling mouths consume evermore.
Know that your efforts shall be in vain,
root.hint: Spacious owners are up in arms about what they describe as an inedible obstruction in their backyard. Districts 29 & 30 reporting.

root.text:
The sky will fill with fierce protection.
Yet that does not ensure survival. 
Keep a wary eye on your rival. 
To know when damage is to be dealt,
root.hint: Northern District 1 Portal Mage scouts have retrieved samples they are refering to as "Saacred."

root.text:
With each day, we near the time and place.
I wish to survive the coming Nine,
And so, your success shall, too, be mine.
Now, I’ll warn you from the very start:
root.hint: Humble owners between Districts 2 and 3 speak of another large root growth. Babbling sounds heard occasionally.

root.text:
If you do not continue to train.
For the Aarena can help you wield
A pitchfork, ax, katana, and shield.
While it’s tempting to be fast and bold,
root.hint: More reports from Citaadel Guards manning the walls about what they are refering to as an "Enormous Root" somewhere between Districts 7, 23, & 24.

root.text:
You have to go where the bluebirds belt.
There, you’ll find information you lack
On when foes will be on the attack.
As time goes on and hearts grow weary,
root.hint: Garden staff between Districts 20-22 are concerned about a mysterious tree that seems to have fallen, where no tree had previously existed!

root.text:
This war is not for the weak of heart.
You cannot truly fathom the cost
‘Til what you love is already lost.
Great Battles shall be waged far and wide,
root.hint: Eye sore reported by Reasonable owners between Districts 1c, 1d, & 9! Neighbors close by speak of euphoric sensations.

root.text:
Fortune favors those who learn to hold.
Yes, your odds shall forever be changed,
If you master skills melee and ranged.
And a structure that’s long been concealed
root.hint: Western Citaadel Guards have spotted another Enormous Root near the walls between Districts 39-41.

root.text:
Trust one day you’ll answer the query:
“Can anyone really change a thing, 
Or are we all puppets on a string?”
Now, no more words! And no distractions!
root.hint: Sightings in Districts 8, 9, 27, & 28 of what some refer to as a "Saacred Root" are reported!

root.text:
Scorching our dear realm on ev’ry side. 
These Battles may come in any form,
Even as carnage becomes the norm.
For your enemies show no pity,
root.hint: Citaadel Guards have spotted more Enormous Roots near the outer walls between Districts 19, 20, 42, & 43.

root.text:
Is nearly ready to be revealed.
Just know that it will be worth the wait,
For what is coming is truly Great:
The day gotchis form a connection,
root.hint: Middle wall patrols have identified another Enormous Root! Reports indicate it is somewhere near the southwest. in Districts 2, 3, 15, & 16.

root.text:
Time is short, so ready your actions!
And as the First of Nine soon comes true,
Remember this, whatever you do:
If you truly hope to one day thrive,
You best keep this Tree of FUD alive.
root.hint: Southern District 1 Portal Mages have retrieved what just might be the final sample of the "Saacred Roots."
